title: 32Pcs Mochi Squishy Toys Mini Kawaii Animals Fruits Squeeze Toy Soft Squishies Stress Relief Sensory Fidget Toys Pack Kids Gifts Party Bag Fillers
features: 🦕【Package Includes】- You will get 32pcs various-shaped mochi squishy toys, including 14 squishy animals, 10 cute dinosaurs, and 8 Colorful fruits. The mixed themes are suitable for both boys and girls to play together, making their every day full of joy.

🐯【Kawaii Design】- These squishy toys come in vibrant colors, diverse styles, and adorable shapes, such as rabbits, tigers, Tyrannosaurus Rex, grapes, strawberries, etc.Kids will love these and make great gifts for birthdays and Children's Day.

🐢【Safe Material】- Squishy fidget toys are made of safe material TPR like rubber, safe nice elasticity and not easy to damage, feels comfortable and soft, could relieve pressure, and you could play with your children anytime, anywhere.(Please don’t put it in your mouth, children are best to play under the supervision of adults.)
🍍【Easy to clean】- Kawaii squishies could be reused, when it gets dirty, it could be washed with mild detergent or soap. If it's too sticky when dry, sprinkle some baby powder.

🍓【Ideal Gift】-Fidget toys is a good choice for party favours for kids,goodie bag fillers,classroom prize,loot bag fillers,pinata fillers,Easter basket fillers,etc.They are also ideal gifts for Halloween, Christmas,Valentine's Day, Easter, New Year,etc.
description: Product Description A Sensory Journey Squishy toys not only enhance kid's perception and hand-eye coordination, but also stimulate their imagination and creativity. Through squishing and manipulating the toys, children can explore different shapes and materials, developing their tactile, visual, and spatial awareness. For adults, squishy toys can serve as a relaxing and stress-relieving activity, helping to alleviate anxiety and pressure while providing a source of creative enjoyment. Whether playing or learning, these toys can bring joy and inspiration to kids This set of 32 Squishy toys is diverse and can satisfy children's curiosity about fruits, animals, and dinosaurs Animal toys has a unique shape, Whether it's dogs, rabbits or fish, Kids can feel the characteristics and textures of animals through touching and kneading. Dinosaur toys are a highlight, with each dinosaur having a unique shape and feature, allow them to embark on thrilling dinosaur battles and prehistoric adventures. Fruit toys have bright colors and interesting shapes, such as strawberries, grapes, peaches, etc. Children can touch the smooth and uneven surface of these fruits. Soft Squishy Toys Made of soft material, providing excellent tactile sensation, they will give you a comfortable tactile experience. Cute Squeeze Toys Very easy to clean, simply wash with soapy water, and they will quickly return to a clean state. Comfy Fidget Toys When you feel stressed or anxious, just gently pinch them to release pressure and bring a relaxing and soothing effect. Notice:Small items may be a choking hazard, please keep away from kids age 3 and below.Children should be used under adult supervision.If spilled, avoid being consumed by children and pets.
